title: Dynamic ViewModel
description: A simple and customizable mod that lets you adjust your item viewmodel in Minecraft — change position, rotation, and scale to fit your style. The latest version also includes presets for quick and easy setup!
body:
## DyanicViewmodel:
A simple and customizable mod that lets you adjust your item viewmodel in Minecraft — **change position, rotation, and scale to fit your style.** 

The latest version also includes presets for quick and easy setup!

Made for my youtube - https://youtube.com/@lluurii11
### Videos of mod:
